rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Implementation-level bindings (like assignments) go in implementation annexes.
Component-level contracts (assumptions, guarantees) go in component type annexes.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annexes.
Use `assign` only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementations.
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in guarantees.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax: `assume "label": expression;`, `guarantee "label": expression;`, `eq name : type = expression;`
Use existing visible identifiers; do not invent new ones.
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not encode AADL properties directly in AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope.
